title: Better End Rod
description: This mod adds new types of end rod
body:
![](https://i.imgur.com/4uAtpSw.png)

Better End Rod is a Minecraft mod that introduces 8 new variations of end rods, each with its own unique crafting recipe. Designed specifically for builders, this mod enhances the building experience by providing a variety of new end rod types for creative use.

![](https://i.imgur.com/CeM83mb.png)
